nasb.text: And the border shall go down to the Jordan and its termination shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land according to its borders all around.’ ”

esv.text: And the border shall go down to the Jordan, and its limit shall be at the Salt Sea. This shall be your land as defined by its borders all around.”

cnv.text: 這邊界要下到約旦河，直到鹽海。這要作你們的土地四周的邊界。’”

ccb.text: 然后沿约旦河南下直到死海。这是你们国土四面的疆界。”
